title: The One Thing
author: Gary Keller
subline: The surprisingly simple truth behind extraordinary results.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A bullseye target: 5 concentric circles. The 4 outer rings are ash hairline. The innermost circle is filled RED. The arrow shaft and arrowhead hit dead center. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1000)" fill="none">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="500" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="400" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="300" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="200" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="100" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="40" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- The arrow: shaft + arrowhead, going from upper-left to center -->
    <line x1="-700" y1="-700" x2="-50" y2="-50" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="4"/>
    <polyline points="-150,-150 -50,-50 -150,50" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="4"/>
    <!-- Fletching -->
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
      <line x1="-700" y1="-700" x2="-740" y2="-740"/>
      <line x1="-720" y1="-680" x2="-760" y2="-720"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="1700" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">WHAT'S THE ONE THING YOU CAN DO THAT MAKES EVERYTHING ELSE EASIER?</text>
</svg>
rationale: A bullseye target. Five concentric circles: 4 in hairline ash, the innermost (the bullseye) filled red. A red arrow flies diagonally from upper-left into the center, the arrowhead touching the red dot. Title 320px uppercase, two lines, weight 500 sits at the bottom. The whole page is a target practice scene.
